license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7yihpue
title: Human primary T cell culture media
author: Bulent Arman Aksoy

steps_raw.instruction: Mix all in a 500 ml 0.22 um filter bottle in the hood:
500 ml RPMI-1640 ( Corning™ cellgro™ RPMI 1640 Medium (Mod.) 1X with L-Glutamine )
25 ul of EMD Millipore™ Calbiochem™ β-Mercaptoethanol, Molecular Biology Grade (715 uM)
12.5 ml of HyClone™ HEPES Solution (25 mM)
5 ml of HyClone™ 100mM Sodium Pyruvate Solution (1X)5 ml of HyClone™ Non Essential Amino Acids NEAA 100x solution (1X)
Sterile filter (0.22um) and aliquot in 50 ml falcon tubes. Keep the media in the fridge, protect from light.
